nasb.text: Then they hurried, each man lowered his sack to the ground, and each man opened his sack.

esv.text: Then each man quickly lowered his sack to the ground, and each man opened his sack.

cnv.text: 於是，他們急忙把自己的布袋卸在地上，各人打開自己的布袋。

ccb.text: 于是，他们急忙把口袋卸到地上打开。

csbs.text: 于是他们急忙把自己的袋子卸在地上，各人都打开自己的袋子。
